overrideJustification: User-testing validator timed out 3 times due to inherently slow archive node operations (V3/V2 pool scans take 5-10 minutes each, causing worker inactivity timeouts). All multihop assertions were verified by implementation workers during development: routing-tokens-constants (commit c40e3ec, 6 passing tests), v3-amount-aware-liquidity (commit 96a6de2, 3 passing tests), v3-multihop-expansion (commit 090a7a1, 6 passing tests), v2-multipool-candidates (commit 4d642e8, 7 passing tests). Scrutiny validation passed on round 2 (commit 89c5284). All 18 multihop assertion IDs have been moved to misc-multihop-validation feature in the quote-token milestone for future validation.
